offer: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, inefficient approval workflows cause delays in financial operations. We convert raw purchase requisition data into standardized approval workflows instead of manual approval processes.
problem: Inefficient approval workflows for purchase requisitions
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities about accounting workflows
Indie Hackers discussions on similar issues
DM outreach to firms with demo video
Engage in community forums sharing tools
try_it: Let users try manual data entry and approval routing on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
